display_information.name: salesforce-agent-dev
display_information.description: [DEV] Query your Salesforce org — parallel bot for testing alongside salesforce-agent.
display_information.long_description:
Hey there 👋 I'm your Salesforce assistant (dev).

I can query your Salesforce org in real time and answer questions about opportunities, accounts, pipeline, and more.

How to use me:
• Send me a direct message to ask a question
• Mention me in a channel with @salesforce-agent-dev and your question

Things I can do:
• Show open pipeline and opportunity details
• Count accounts, opportunities, or other records
• Find deals closing this month/quarter
• Look up opportunities by owner, stage, or amount
• Summarize recently closed-won deals

assistant_view.assistant_description: [DEV] Query your Salesforce org in real time — opportunities, accounts, pipeline, and more.
